function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the two oldest invoices linked to the Helios tax-firm client (Claudia): INV-0006 (2025-12-18) and INV-0007 (2026-01-19).

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed. Verification: attachments were both previously read and are newest-first among included files (2026-01-19 then 2025-12-18), recipient matches canonical Miles sender for reply. Next required cleanup is deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Created one outbound draft email record in outbox for the invoice reply request.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task was to handle next inbox item. I processed lowest inbox file, verified identity from canonical entity records, read all 6 related finance files from preflight/inbox context, selected oldest two invoices by issued dates (2025-12-18 and 2026-01-19), created one outbound draft, deleted inbox item. Completeness check passed (processed full set).
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested processing.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item and completed the request. I drafted an outbound reply at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md with the two oldest Claudia-linked invoices attached (INV-0006 and INV-0007), then removed the handled inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read inbox-processing workflows, treated inbox frontmatter as canonical sender metadata, resolved identity via cast primary_contact_email, processed full related finance set before selection, performed one outbox write, then deleted completed inbox item.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email requested: 'Reply back with the oldest 2 invoices linked to the client at the tax firm.' Canonical sender miles@novak.example matched 10_entities/cast/miles.md; client resolved to Claudia in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md. From the six linked Helios invoices read, the two oldest issue dates are 2025-12-18 (INV-0006) and 2026-01-19 (INV-0007). Draft reply was created with those attachments, and inbox item was removed per inbox-processing cleanup rule.
completed_steps_laconic: read entity records miles.md and claudia.md
